title: Directed Perturbations for Efficient Learning of Surrogate Losses
title_es: Perturbaciones dirigidas para aprendizaje eficiente de pérdidas subrogadas
description_es: Este trabajo presenta un método novedoso para aprender pérdidas subrogadas de manera eficiente mediante perturbaciones dirigidas en redes neuronales.

publication.venue: 2025 International Joint Conference on Neural Networks

abstract: Learning effective surrogate loss functions is crucial for optimizing complex objectives. This paper introduces a novel approach using directed perturbations to efficiently learn surrogate losses that approximate original objectives with high fidelity.

citations.apa: Cargan, T. R., Landa-Silva, D., & Triguero, I. (2025). Directed Perturbations for Efficient Learning of Surrogate Losses. In 2025 International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN). IEEE.
citations.mla: Cargan, Tyler R., et al. "Directed Perturbations for Efficient Learning of Surrogate Losses." 2025 International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN), IEEE, 2025.
